untranslatable_reason: Signal requires explicit divergence detection (price vs momentum divergence over 20-bar lookback window) and coherence phase alignment measurement. These require multi-bar comparative analysis and custom divergence metrics not available in the allowed indicator set. MACD used as proxy for momentum, but cannot directly express: (1) 3+ bar directional confirmation with prior trend reversal detection, (2) divergence magnitude calculation and 40% coherence threshold comparison, (3) phase alignment validation between two series. A proper implementation would need custom divergence oscillator or multi-bar lookback functions.
translation_notes: Partial translation using MACD as momentum proxy and price/SMA crossovers as directional confirmation. The core requirement—detecting when price and momentum both reverse AND move back into phase alignment after prior divergence—cannot be fully expressed with point-in-time indicator comparisons. This signal requires statistical divergence analysis across a rolling window.
